remaining_params.SpellDescription: Create a 1/1 colorless Servo artifact creature token.

params.SpellDescription: The next spell you cast this turn has affinity for artifacts. (It costs {1} less to cast for each artifact you control as you cast it.)

params.SpellDescription: For each artifact you control, create a token that's a copy of it. Those tokens gain haste. Exile those tokens at the beginning of the next end step.
